tests.name: Register - password validation starts every field empty and shows no error box before submitting
Register - password validation rejects an empty/short password
Register - password validation rejects a password missing an uppercase letter
Register - password validation rejects a password missing a lowercase letter
Register - password validation rejects a password missing a digit
Register - password validation rejects a password missing whitespace
Register - password validation rejects a password shorter than 8 characters even if all character classes are present
Register - password validation accepts a password that satisfies every requirement (8 chars, boundary case)
Register - password validation updates the name and email fields when typed into
CartContext starts with an empty cart
CartContext adds a product to the cart and updates the total
